title: Opening for Software Engineer at Practo Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at Practo Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Practo Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Howrah-based team.

About Practo Advisory Limited:
Practo Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Practo Advisory Limited!
